# Biagio Scaglia - Portfolio & CV

> Interactive Windows 7-style portfolio and professional CV.

This site is an interactive portfolio simulating a Windows 7 environment. It showcases the professional profile, skills, work experience, education, and projects of Biagio Scaglia, a Full Stack & Mobile Developer and UX/UI Designer based in Bari/Modugno, Italy.

Here is the detailed developer profile and resume information:

---

**Profile**
Full Stack & Mobile Developer and UX/UI Designer based in Bari/Modugno, Italy. Specialized in creating scalable web and mobile applications with clean code, modern architectures, and polished user experiences.

**Core Information**
- Full Name: Biagio Scaglia
- Role: Software Developer & UX/UI Designer
- Location: Bari, Puglia, Italy

**Technical Stack**
- Programming Languages: TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, Java, PHP, C# (.NET)
- Frontend & Mobile: React, React Native, Flutter, Astro, HTML5, CSS3, Bootstrap, TailwindCSS, Angular, Vue
- Backend & Database: .NET (C#), Express (Node.js), Laravel (PHP), MySQL, JSON
- Design & Tools: Figma, Canva, Git, GitHub

**Work Experience**
- Freelance Web & Mobile Developer (Biagio Scaglia Dev - Autonomo | May 2026 - Present): Building digital products, custom solutions, and mobile apps with Flutter (e.g. Vellum app on Google Play Store).
- Full Stack Developer (.NET / React) (Prisma Srl | Feb 2026 - Present): Developing modern, scalable web applications using .NET for the backend and React for the frontend.
- Telegram Bot Developer (Pokémon Go - Raid Italia | Apr 2026 - Jun 2026): Programmed and optimized custom automation bots using Python.
- Sviluppatore Web (Frontend Developer) (Yumeverse Games | Dec 2025 - Jun 2026): Created interactive landing pages using Astro and JavaScript.
- Sviluppatore Applicazioni Mobili (sgamapp | Sep 2025 - Feb 2026): Built web/mobile apps to reduce the digital gap for JOB&Orienta event.
- Sviluppatore di Software (PASSBARI | Aug 2025 - Aug 2025): Developed and optimized responsive web and mobile applications.
- Consulente AI (Consorzio Artemide | Jun 2024 - Dec 2024): Implemented AI-driven marketing strategies and campaigns.

**Education & Certifications**
- ITS Academy Apulia Digital Maker: Corso di specializzazione tecnica in Web & Mobile Development.
- Pre Security (SEC0) Certificate: TryHackMe (April 2026 - April 2029) | Credential ID: 69cea1adeb170aea55e91ffd
- Pre Security Certificate: TryHackMe (April 2026 - April 2029) | Credential ID: THM-E8TJBPYZM8
- Cybersecurity Essential: Cisco (January 2022)
- Wordpress Development / SEO / JavaScript, HTML, CSS: Programming Hub (2023)
- Web & Python Development Professional Certifications: IMTF (2024)

---

## Projects & Links

- [Vellum on Google Play Store](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.biagioscaglia.vellum) - Custom Android application built with Flutter.
- [sgamapp](https://biagio-scaglia.github.io/) - Web/mobile application reducing the digital gap for vulnerable users.
- [Raid Italia Bot](https://github.com/biagio-scaglia) - Automated deals engine and Telegram bot built with Python.
- [Yumeverse Games Landing Page](https://biagio-scaglia.github.io/) - Interactive frontend site created with Astro.
